emails.subject: Re: Reciprocal Physical Guaranty
emails.body: Please give me a status on the Master Physical with Engage US. Per the e-mail below, Engage is ready to supply us with an amended guaranty. Thanks Russell Forwarded by Russell Diamond/HOU/ECT on 09/21/2000 10:00 AM To: Kiran.Parthasarathy@EngageEnergy.com
